event_title: Scalatron Hackathon at Originate in SF
title: Scalatron Hackathon at Originate in SF
description: Scalatron is a free, open-source programming game in which bots, written in Scala, compete in a virtual arena for energy and survival. This is a friendly tournament (except for killing your neighbor's bot) and a great way to learn or grow in Scala. Just bring your laptop and an empty stomach, you don't even need Scala installed as everything is compiled on the server. Schedule 5:30 - Arrival / Networking / Eat hot pizza 6:00 - Start building bot 8:00 - Kill all humans / start competition 8:30 – Decompress /network / eat cold pizza Please tag tweets with #scalasv.
